summary: The native trust and key tooling phase is implemented and validated on phase/native-trust-and-key-tooling. Native mode now owns key inspection, key generation, and known-host scans; browser mode retains the backend path. Repo validation passed after refreshing stale Playwright selectors. Local macOS localhost SSH fixtures must be run unsandboxed for valid results.
next_steps: Start packaging-and-release-hardening on a new phase branch after review.
Reduce local desktop sandbox friction for localhost SSH fixtures in the dedicated remediation phase.
Decide when to promote the validated phase branch to CI review and merge.
blockers: No code blocker remains for native trust/key tooling itself.
Packaging and release hardening still needs its own execution phase.
